plot outline: Mike Wazowski (Billy Crystal) and James P. "Sully" Sullivan (John Goodman) are an inseparable pair, but that wasn't always the case. From the moment these two mismatched monsters met, they couldn't stand each other. This movie unlocks the door to how Mike and Sully overcame their differences and became the best of friends.
title: Monsters University
akas: Monsters, Inc. 2: Lost in Scaradise (United States)
モンスターズ・ユニバーシティ (Japan, Japanese title)
